---
name: port-assignment
description: Find available ports in the 8800-8999 range.
argument-hint: 'Find available port or "verify port 8850"'
---

# Port Assignment

Find an unused host port in the `8800-8999` range.

Rules:
- Follow [AGENTS.md](../../../AGENTS.md)
- Verify availability before assigning a port
- Check `apps/*/config.json` first
